<p class="key-answer" data-question="Cemiplimab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Cemiplimab</strong> 目前有 <strong>16 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Cemiplimab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma  Libtayo as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic or locally advanced cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma (mCSCC or laCSCC) who...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L2</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>gallbladder adenosquamous carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>glottis squamous cell carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>rectal cloacogenic carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>external ear basal cell carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>adenosquamous prostate carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>urethral verrucous carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>lung occult squamous cell carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>pancreatic adenosquamous carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>non-keratinizing sinonasal squamous cell carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>supraglottis squamous cell carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>larynx verrucous carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>spindle cell variant squamous cell breast carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>non-small cell squamous lung carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>cervical adenosquamous carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>adenosquamous breast carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>acantholytic variant squamous cell breast carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>esophagus verrucous carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>maxillary sinus carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>carcinoma of lip（100.0%）</li>
<li>lacrimal gland carcinoma（100.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
